heading: Abolition of United States International Development Cooperation Agency
label: 6561 Abolition of United States International Development Cooperation Agency
notes: Effective Date, subdiv. A, title XIV, § 1401, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–277, div. G112 Stat. 2681–790Oct. 21, 1998“This title [see Tables for classification], and the amendments made by this title, shall take effect on the earlier of—“(1); orApril 1, 1999“(2)the date of abolition [] of the United States International Development Cooperation Agency pursuant to the reorganization plan described in section 1601 [].”Apr. 1, 199922 U.S.C. 6601

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions, personnel, assets, and liabilities of the Overseas Private Investment Corporation to the United States International Development Finance Corporation and treatment of related references, see sections 9683 and 9686(d) of this title.
amendments: Effective Date, subdiv. A, title XIV, § 1401, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–277, div. G112 Stat. 2681–790Oct. 21, 1998“This title [see Tables for classification], and the amendments made by this title, shall take effect on the earlier of—“(1); orApril 1, 1999“(2)the date of abolition [] of the United States International Development Cooperation Agency pursuant to the reorganization plan described in section 1601 [].”Apr. 1, 199922 U.S.C. 6601

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except for the components specified in subsection (b), the United States International Development Cooperation Agency (including the Institute for Scientific and Technological Cooperation) is abolished.

children.heading: AID and OPIC exempted
children.label: b AID and OPIC exempted
children.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to the Agency for International Development or the Overseas Private Investment Corporation.
